messages.subject: Call for Proposals to host userR! 2020
messages.subject_clean: Call for Proposals to host userR! 2020
messages.body_plain:
The R Foundation Conference Committee has published a call for proposals to
host the useR! 2020 conference in North America. For details see:

https://www.r-project.org/useR-2020_call.html

The deadline for submissions is 16 November.

On behalf of the R Foundation.
Martyn Plummer

	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
